---
description: Create an implementation plan from a feature idea.
argument-hint: <feature description | PRD path>
---
# Create Plan

Input: $ARGUMENTS
Workflow: $WORKFLOW_ID

Read `AGENTS.md` and inspect the codebase before proposing changes. Produce `$ARTIFACTS_DIR/plan.md` with scope, files likely to change, test-first tasks, validation commands, and explicit non-goals. Do not edit code in this step.
